notes: Real EmbeddingGemma probe on the bounded retrieval drift slice.
Runs in-process to amortize HF runtime startup and keep specialist results operational on this Mac.
Uses prefix-aware retrieval with dimension and quantization stressors from generated variants.
Real EmbeddingGemma clean retrieval lane on the full 12-task retrieval track.
Runs in-process to amortize HF startup overhead on this Mac.
Real EmbeddingGemma drift lane across multilingual, multimodal, and reduced-budget retrieval variants.
Expands beyond the earlier bounded retrieval specialist probe with two additional retrieval tasks.
Narrow clean modular full-stack lane where both real specialists are active.
Uses only the current retrieval-bearing full-stack tasks so specialist effects are observable rather than incidental.
Narrow modular full-stack drift lane where the real retriever and real router are both active.
Mixes parallel audit, retrieval-guided repo patching, and multimodal billing guardrail flows.
Bounded FunctionGemma probe on parallel and validator-sensitive routing surfaces.
Runs in-process to amortize HF runtime startup and keep specialist results operational on this Mac.
Keeps multi-step planning in Gemma 4 while replacing heuristic routing with a real specialist backend.
Real FunctionGemma clean routing lane on the full 12-task routing track.
Incorporates the schema-repair and runtime-argument adapter fixes from the latest specialist pass.
Real FunctionGemma drift lane after the schema-repair and runtime-adapter fixes.
Adds two new clean routing tasks so schema and context robustness are measured on more than the original bounded pair.
Focused multilingual multimodal check after strengthening French screenshot prompts and answer matching.
Runs in-process to avoid the fresh-process HF import penalty observed in the local worker probe.
Intended to confirm the last known drift miss before wider scaling.
HF reference slice without thinking for direct comparison against MLX and HF thinking-on.
HF native thinking slice on the full thinking track.
Uses a larger token budget because thought and final answer share the same decode path in the local HF runner.
Bounded-autonomy full-stack slice aimed at human-job-like operational work.
Measures strict interface correctness, recovered execution, and real-world readiness together.
Real-world retrieval slice where evidence quality and final answer quality are reported separately.
Includes multilingual and multimodal production-risk questions.
Job-like routing slice that stresses validator feedback, parallel evidence gathering, and high-cost billing patch intents.
Real-world judgment slice for escalation decisions without tool use.
Local default retrieval baseline on the balanced 12-task retrieval track.
Keeps heuristic retrieval as the fast local reference for comparison against real EmbeddingGemma.
Covers multilingual, long-history, and reduced-budget retrieval perturbations.
Local default full-stack baseline with heuristic specialists.
Uses a larger final-answer budget so end-to-end summaries do not truncate after correct tool execution.
Exercises full-stack validator, changed-constraint, and compact-context variants.
Local default reasoning baseline for text and image thinking tasks.
Runs on the balanced 12-task thinking track.
Factorized thinking drift probe across language, context, and image-grounding tasks.

run_group_snapshots.description: Real-world autonomy probe focused on bounded, job-like tasks where the model must preserve state, recover without human correction, and synthesize the right action from text, tools, and screenshots.

Specialist-backed factorized drift probe using real FunctionGemma and EmbeddingGemma on the bounded lanes where those specialists are now validated. Includes a narrow modular full-stack lane that combines both specialists in retrieval-bearing tasks.

Broader alpha benchmark matrix using MLX E2B as the local default on this Apple Silicon machine while also folding in the validated HF specialist lanes for EmbeddingGemma retrieval, FunctionGemma routing, and a narrow clean modular full-stack path that uses both specialists together.

Real specialist-backend probe on bounded slices. Uses Hugging Face backends for FunctionGemma and EmbeddingGemma so routing and retrieval claims are grounded in actual specialist models rather than heuristics.
